example: **After the break**, we will continue our discussion.
**Let's move on** to the next topic.
**Next we will learn** how to write paragraphs.
**Time is up**. Please stop writing.
Please **hand in your homework** before you leave.
**Class is over**. See you tomorrow.
Goodbye class. **See you tomorrow**.
**Goodbye everyone**. Have a great weekend.
**Have a nice day**! See you later.
Bye! **See you next time**.
**Don't forget to** bring your textbook tomorrow.
**Remember to** review your notes after class.
Always **do your homework** on time.
Please **preview the next lesson** before class.
Take time to **review what we learned** today.
You should **practice more** to improve.
Please **read aloud** so everyone can hear.
**Write down** the important words in your notebook.
**Underline the** key points in the text.
**Circle the correct answer** on your paper.
**Fill in the blanks** with the right words.
**Match the pictures** to the correct words.
**Choose the right one** from the options.
**Complete the sentences** with your own ideas.
Can you **make sentences** with these words?
Please **translate into Chinese** this paragraph.
**Translate into English** what I just said.
Now let's **work in groups** of four.
**Discuss with your group** for five minutes.
Please **share your ideas** with the class.
**Listen to the tape** carefully and answer questions.
**Read after the tape** to practice pronunciation.
**Repeat after me**: hello, goodbye.
Please **follow along** in your books.
Let's **go back to** page twenty.
Now let's **go on to** the next exercise.
**Let's check the answers** together.
**Who can answer** this question?
**Who knows the answer** to number three?
Please **put up your hand** if you know.
**Don't shout out** the answer. Raise your hand.
Please **wait your turn** to speak.
**Be patient please**. Everyone will get a chance.
Just **try your best** and you will improve.
**Don't worry about** making mistakes.
**It's OK to** ask questions anytime.
Everyone **makes mistakes** when learning.
You can **learn from mistakes** and improve.
Remember: **practice makes perfect**!
**Keep trying** and you will succeed.
